global_summary: This week the company owes 103 planned work-days — 88 due today, only 29 earned — plus 4 project starts, of which 2 began. Every project is behind its weekly plan, echoing last week's all-missed verdicts (Jul 13-19). Priority: foundations at Karim, inspections at Rohini and Martha, and trims across the finishing jobs.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: One work-day due this week and none earned; the final building inspection is still open. Schedule it now — it was due Mon Jul 20.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind this week: 10 of 27 planned work-days earned (Slip: 68%). Install tiles by Tue Jul 28 to stop more work sliding into August.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Only 1 of 10 planned work-days earned (Slip: 64%). Finish gutters, cleaning and the secret door by Fri Jul 24, then the building inspection Sat Jul 25.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: No progress on this week's 10 planned work-days (Slip: 40%). Start the second-floor paint change order by Sun Jul 26 to protect the July finish.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Slip: 43% of the month plan (29.0 of 56.0 expected work-days done; 8/25 tasks). Key move: ROOFING: INSTALL SHINGLES (Fri Jul 17 → Fri Aug 7, +21d).

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Furthest along overall but behind this week: 3 of 7 due work-days earned (Slip: 20%). Start insulation by Sat Jul 25; siding already slipped to August.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Halfway to this week's plan — 8 of 16 due work-days earned (Slip: 31%). Finish countertops and electrical/plumbing trim by Sat Jul 25 to save the week.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Behind: 2 of 6 due work-days earned (Slip: 36%). Pour the foundation concrete by Mon Jul 27 — it and the cure already slipped into August.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Closest to pace — 5 of 6 due work-days earned (Slip: 22%). Install tiles by Sun Jul 26 to keep flooring and trim on their dates.
